case_title: DAVIS, BOBBIE vs. POCHINI, DIANA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, BOBBIE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT POCHINI, DIANA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT POCHINI, DIANA
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT POCHINI, DIANA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, BOBBIE SERVED JUL-27-1996, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT POCHINI, DIANA
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT POCHINI, DIANA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION PLTF WAIVED THE RENT DEPOSIT STAYED UNTIL AUG-27-1996
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, BOBBIE AS TO DEFENDANT POCHINI, DIANA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POCHINI, DIANA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 156 LILY ST. S.F. CA.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $24.64 FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, BOBBIE

JUDGE QUIDACHAY, KBAUER, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK 11:40 AM IN DEPT 2, LAW & MOTION CALENDAR ON THE STAY OF EVICTION TIME, DEPT PRESENT & APPEARING IN PRO PER. ROLAND LEE APPEARING FOR PLTF. CASE SETTLED, TERMS AS FOLLOWS: DEFT TO VOLUNTARILY MOVE OUT OF THE PREMISES BEFORE 8/27/96, TAKE ALL HER BELONGINGS, IF LEFT BEHIND DEEMED AS GARBAGE. IN EXCHANGE, PLTF WAIVES ALL BACK RENTS INCLUDING NOT TO PUT UP A WEEKS RENT, MUTUAL RELEASES OF CLAIMS, NO FURTHER STAYS. PLTF TO STOP SHERIFF FROM EVICTION DEFT TOMORROW, 8/21/96. DEFAULT THAT EXISTS WILL STAY. BOTH PARTIES AGREED TO TERMS.
